release_notes:
🚀 What's New in v1.3.0:

📺 New Sources & Fixes:
- Added several new movie/anime sources and fixed existing ones for a more stable and diverse content library.

🎬 New Video Player:
- Introduced a brand new video player! You can now switch to the new player from the settings for an enhanced viewing experience.

⚡ Extreme Performance:
- Boosted Anime section loading speed by 70% using a new synchronized GraphQL fetch engine.

✨ Premium UI (Skeleton Loading):
- Introduced modern Shimmer-based skeletons for all content carousels to ensure a smooth, high-end visual experience during data loading.

🎯 Smart Ad Recovery:
- Added real-time ad synchronization. Ads now resume instantly the moment DNS protection is disabled without requiring an app restart.

🛠 Critical Bug Fixes:
- Fixed 'Continue Watching' logic to correctly track current seasons instead of resetting to season 1.
- Resolved the 'Check for Updates' loading indicator freeze in Settings.

🔒 Secure & Signed:
- This version is officially signed with a secure keystore to ensure safe installation and better compatibility across all Android devices.
